One_NEO_Detailed_Component_List: A 'column' = ONE M-Tile = ONE Booth multiplier running vertically
16 columns per NEO (split between 2 G-Tiles: 0-7 and 8-15)
Each column reads different SRCB[col] (broadcasted to all 8 rows)
Produces 16 results per cycle (8 rows × 2 FP-Lanes/row)
A 'row' = Output row in the GEMM matrix (M-dimension)
8 rows per column (but only 4 active output rows per G-Tile at a time)
All rows in same column share same SRCB[col] (broadcast)
Each row accumulates to different DEST rows
Container module that holds 8 M-Tile columns
Physical MAC compute engine = ONE Booth multiplier column
Reads same SRCB[col] for all 8 rows (broadcast)
Produces 16 INT8 MACs per cycle (8 rows × 2 lanes)
Per-M-Tile enable for independent power control
Note: 'M-Tile' in firmware parlance = mode (INT8), not a physical tile
Physical MAC unit (Booth multiplier + adder tree)
With INT8_2x packing: processes INT8_A×INT8_C (lane r0) and INT8_B×INT8_D (lane r1) in same cycle
